description: Extracted patterns, frameworks, and skill structures for MCV NAOS integration

orchestration.description: Workflow pipeline, subagent-driven development, parallel dispatch, HITL checkpoints

agents.description: Agent types, communication protocol, coordination patterns, prompt best practices

composition.description: Skill architecture, skill TDD, bulletproofing, cross-skill references

patterns.description: TDD, verification before completion, systematic debugging, testing anti-patterns

memory.description: Context injection, progressive loading, token efficiency, venture-scoped memory

key_patterns.name: Subagent-Driven Development
key_patterns.description: Fresh agent per task + two-stage review (spec then quality)

key_patterns.name: Two-Stage Review Gate
key_patterns.description: Spec compliance review BEFORE code quality review

key_patterns.name: Context Injection Pattern
key_patterns.description: Controller provides ALL context, subagent never reads files

key_patterns.name: Skill TDD
key_patterns.description: Test skills with pressure scenarios before deployment
